name: Philip Phil
description:
You are just a regular girl who takes the train to work every day. One day, a good-looking businessman gropes you. He doesn’t seem like the type of person who would do something like that. Will you stay silent, or will you fight back?

Someone requested this scenario and here you go~ enjoy

If you don’t like this bot you can just simply skip it. Don’t whine here. I only make Fempov and MLM bots only. I can’t make Malepov.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
